kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Rowan goes with either Carpenter or Mason.
Weaver, Chisel, Highrow, and 6 coins belong to different artisans.
More members of the River Ward are in the Clothiers' Guild than members of the Hill Ward.
Between Edmund and 9 coins, one goes with Bridgegate and the other with Riverside.
Cooper goes with at most two of Aldric, Needle, Eastcheap, and 9 coins.
Godfrey's levy is lower than both the artisan with the Saw and the artisan in Eastcheap.
The Mason's levy is between Godfrey and the artisan in Riverside.
Between Blacksmith and Cooper, one goes with 9 coins and the other with 10 coins.
9 coins goes with exactly three of Edmund, Cooper, Needle, and Riverside.
Kingsford goes with exactly two of Wulfric, Weaver, Awl, and 10 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Royce goes with either Bluegill or Crappie.
Perch, Spinnerbait, Grayreach, and 2 lb belong to different catches.
More members of the North Watershed are in the Catfish Family than members of the South Watershed.
Between Esther and 5 lb, one goes with Birchpool and the other with Pinehollow.
Catfish goes with at most two of Cody, Swimbait, Foxglen, and 5 lb.
Mabel's weight is lower than both the angler using the Wobbler and the angler at Foxglen.
The angler who landed the Crappie's weight is between Mabel and the angler at Pinehollow.
Between Bass and Catfish, one goes with 5 lb and the other with 6 lb.
5 lb goes with exactly three of Esther, Catfish, Swimbait, and Pinehollow.
Mossbank goes with exactly two of Wade, Perch, Crankbait, and 6 lb.
